offer: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month, inconsistent compliance reporting causes late tax filings. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual reporting processes using spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try monthly financial statement generation and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Default reminder schedules for compliance tasks
CSV import for existing compliance data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
